subcodes.first_line: The Most Great Name beareth witness that thou didst turn unto, and believe in, God, the Lord of Eternity, on a Day whereon the nations turned away [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: قد شهد الاسم الاعظم بانک اقبلت و آمنت بالله مالک القدم فی یوم فیه اعرض الامم
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
